title: The Candle Champion Attacks
description: On pages 2–5, the candle champion attacks as luffy, Usopp, and Karoo break Baroque Works’ formation, exposing Mr. 3’s wax armor and freeing the crew from the execution trap.
scene: The Candle Champion Attacks. Luffy, Usopp, and Karoo break Baroque Works’ formation, exposing Mr. 3’s wax armor and freeing the crew from the execution trap. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Whoa, will the guys be alright with such a big fire!?

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: How dare you destroy my candle service set...!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: As if I'd let you get away!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'll crush your neck into pieces!

dialogue.speaker: Miss Goldenweek
dialogue.text: Wasn't there a better way to save us?

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 5
dialogue.text: Hey, you should be grateful you're even alive.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Cough, Cough! I can't believe it... we're actually still alive.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: Hmph, so you've melted the wax, have you now!? What a pain...

dialogue.speaker: Karoo
dialogue.text: I can't have you mess up our mission any more than this!

summary: This part centers on the candle champion attacks, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
